updates.title: Furniture Stability v2
updates.description: Fixed the 'messy room' bug! Your furniture arrangements are now perfectly preserved across all room styles using stable ID tracking.

updates.title: Bring to Front Logic
updates.description: Moved items now automatically jump to the top layer, making it much easier to layer your furniture.

updates.title: Sync+ Optimization
updates.description: Optimized firestore sync logic for even more reliable data persistence across sessions.
